channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Launches Massive Drone and Missile Attack on Kyiv, Killing One
item.description: Russia attacked Ukraine's capital with ballistic missiles and drones early Thursday, killing at least one person and injuring 31. The assault damaged residential buildings across six districts and came hours after a rare daytime attack involving 800 drones that killed six people.

item.title: 🇮🇳 BRICS Foreign Ministers Meet in India as Iran War Tests Bloc Unity
item.description: Foreign ministers from BRICS nations began a two-day meeting in New Delhi as divisions over the Iran war, rising energy prices, and competing regional interests strain the expanding bloc. Iran's deputy foreign minister said one member country pushed for language condemning Iran, complicating consensus.

item.title: 🇨🇩 M23 Rebels and Rwandan Soldiers Accused of War Crimes in DR Congo
item.description: Human Rights Watch documented summary executions, rape, and forced recruitment during M23's occupation of Uvira in eastern DR Congo. At least 53 civilians were executed and eight cases of rape were documented. Rwanda denies supporting M23 despite UN evidence of its control over rebel operations.

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB Warns of Rate Hikes if Iran War Oil Shock Deanchors Inflation
item.description: European Central Bank chief economist Philip Lane warned that a global oil shock from the Iran war may require raising interest rates to prevent fuel costs from spreading to wages and broader prices. The warning highlights mounting economic pressure from the conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing Ends After Two Hours of Talks
item.description: The high-stakes meeting between President Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping concluded after 2 hours and 15 minutes. The summit addressed trade disputes, Taiwan tensions, and the Iran war. This marked the first visit by a U.S. president to America's main strategic rival since 2017.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 Xi Warns Trump of US-China Clash if Taiwan Issue Mishandled
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping told Trump during their Beijing summit that Taiwan must be handled properly or the two nations will face conflict. Xi called for the US and China to be partners rather than rivals as the high-stakes meeting began.

item.title: ⚽ Quarter of World Cup Games at Risk of Dangerous Heat, Scientists Warn
item.description: Climate change has increased the risk of extreme heat at the 2026 World Cup, with 26 of 104 matches potentially facing conditions that require cooling breaks. The final has a 1-in-8 chance of reaching heat levels that could force postponement.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Iran War Overshadows Trump's China Visit as Peace Talks Stall
item.description: Donald Trump is expected to ask China to help end the costly and unpopular Iran war in discussions with Xi Jinping, with peace talks stalled and the global economic cost of the conflict increasing.

item.title: 💰 Gold Edges Up as Weaker Dollar Awaits Trump-Xi Talks
item.description: Gold prices rose on a weaker dollar as markets awaited the outcome of the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing. Investors are watching for any developments on trade and the Iran conflict that could affect global markets.

item.title: 🛢️ Stressed Crude Oil Market Looks to Xi-Trump Summit for Iran Help
item.description: The oil market is watching the Trump-Xi summit for any developments that could ease supply disruptions from the Iran war. A resolution could stabilize crude prices that have surged amid the conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China's Yuan Hits 3-Year High as Trump-Xi Summit Begins
item.description: China's yuan edged up to a three-year high against the dollar while stock indexes dipped as investors awaited the outcome of the summit between the leaders of the world's two largest economies.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House Members Force Vote on Ukraine Aid Defying Leadership
item.description: US House members moved to force a vote on Ukraine aid, defying leadership as the war continues. The move highlights ongoing congressional pressure to support Kyiv amid the conflict with Russia.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump and Xi Set for Beijing Talks with Trade Truce and Iran War at Stake
item.description: The Trump-Xi summit in Beijing takes on added significance as the first visit by a US president to America's main strategic rival since 2017. Trade disputes, Taiwan tensions, and the Iran war top the agenda.

item.title: 🇮🇳 Iran War Casts Shadow Over BRICS Foreign Ministers Meeting in Delhi
item.description: BRICS foreign ministers met in New Delhi as the Iran war and its economic fallout dominated discussions. The bloc faces internal divisions over the conflict and its impact on member nations.

item.title: 🛢️ Russia's Oil Output Down 460,000 BPD Year-on-Year in April, IEA Says
item.description: Russia's oil production fell by 460,000 barrels per day in April compared to last year, according to the International Energy Agency. The decline reflects the impact of sanctions and the Ukraine war on Russian energy exports.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Fed Chair Nominee Warsh Set to Get US Senate Nod as Inflation Intensifies
item.description: Kevin Warsh, President Trump's nominee for Federal Reserve chair, is expected to receive Senate confirmation as inflation concerns mount. The nomination comes amid economic uncertainty from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese AI Satire of US War on Iran Goes Viral
item.description: Chinese AI-generated satire videos mocking the US war on Iran have gone viral, highlighting how digital content is shaping narratives around the conflict. The videos reflect growing Chinese public engagement with geopolitical events.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Does Iran Have a Yuan-for-Hormuz-Oil Trade Plan? Why Analysts in China Are Urging Caution
item.description: Chinese analysts are debating whether Iran could accept yuan payments for oil transiting through the Strait of Hormuz. The discussion highlights China's complex position in the Iran conflict and its energy security concerns.

item.title: 💰 Warsh Wins Confirmation as Fed Chair with Inflation Focus
item.description: Kevin Warsh won confirmation as Federal Reserve chair with a mandate to address rising inflation. His confirmation comes as economic pressures from the Iran war mount.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Says It Struck Russian Oil and Gas Infrastructure
item.description: Ukraine said it struck Russian oil and gas infrastructure in continued attacks on Russian energy facilities. The strikes are part of Ukraine's campaign to degrade Russia's war-fighting capability.

item.title: 🇨🇭 US Informs Switzerland of Delays in Patriot Delivery Due to Price Hike
item.description: The United States informed Switzerland of delays in Patriot missile system deliveries due to price increases. The notification highlights strains on defense procurement amid global conflicts.

item.title: 🇿🇲 Zambia's Central Bank Cuts Main Interest Rate to 13.25%
item.description: Zambia's central bank cut its main interest rate to 13.25% as inflation pressures ease in the copper-producing nation. The move reflects divergent monetary policy paths among emerging markets.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Explosions Rock Kyiv as Russia's Mass Daytime Drone Strike Becomes Large-Scale Missile Attack
item.description: Explosions rocked Kyiv as Russia's rare daytime drone attack escalated into a large-scale missile strike. The assault marked an intensification of Russian attacks on Ukraine's capital.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Stages Navy Drill as US and Philippines Embark on Balikatan Exercises
item.description: China conducted naval exercises as the US and Philippines began joint military exercises. The dueling drills highlight rising tensions in the South China Sea region.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany: 5 on Trial After Attack on Israeli Arms Firm
item.description: Five people went on trial in Germany after an attack on an Israeli arms firm. The case highlights ongoing tensions related to the Middle East conflict playing out in Europe.
